title: HUDCO is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: HUDCO is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
HUDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HUDCO:
HUDCO is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HUDCO!
